{{CargoRelic
|name=Lunar Spirit Stone
|class_id=20631
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=A wondrous ore with a colorful luster, capable of absorbing and converting the energy released during the crystallization process into various valuable substances. It is a rare treasure in the Moon Palace.
|fame=16
|art=30
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +1<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 200/200
|ss2=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 200/200
|ss3=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 200/200
|ss4=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 200/200
|ss7=Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
